revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:8 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:8月23日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 8월 23일]][[zh-min-nan:8 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:八月廿三]][[zh:八月廿三]]
{{Not to be confused with|August 23|qq=August 23}}
<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=八月廿三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 8월 23일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar August|qq=}} '''August 23''' is the 23rd day of the month {{ill|August (Lunisolar)|ja|8月 (旧暦)|lt=August (Hazuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/August (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 8th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11635368}}. == Events == * {{ill|Jōhō|en|Jōhō|qid=Q1193592|lt=Shōho|1=Jōhō}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1074|en|1074|qid=Q19438|lt=1074|1=1074}} {{ill|September 16|en|September 16|qid=Q2897|lt=September 16|1=September 16}}) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Enkyū|en|Enkyū|qid=Q1193638|lt=Enkyū|1=Enkyū}} to {{ill|Jōhō|en|Jōhō|qid=Q1193592|lt=Shōho|1=Jōhō}} via {{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11498853}}. * {{ill|Jishō|en|Jishō|qid=Q1194671|lt=Chishō|1=Jishō}} 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1180|en|1180|qid=Q19702|lt=1180|1=1180}} {{ill|September 14|en|September 14|qid=Q2847|lt=September 14|1=September 14}}) – In the {{ill|Battle of Ishibashiyama|en|Battle of Ishibashiyama|qid=Q2888010|lt=Ishibashiyama no Tatakau|1=Battle of Ishibashiyama}}, approximately 300 cavalrymen led by {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|en|Minamoto no Yoritomo|qid=Q242800|lt=Minamoto no Yoritomo|1=Minamoto no Yoritomo}} were defeated by roughly 3,000 cavalrymen under {{ill|Ōba Kagechika|en|Ōba Kagechika|qid=Q1155414|lt=Ōba Kagechika|1=Ōba Kagechika}}. * {{ill|Kakēi (Japan)|ja|嘉慶|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kakēi (Japan)|1=Kakēi (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11419403}} 1st year/{{ill|Genchū|en|Genchū|qid=Q1146236|lt=Genchū|1=Genchū}} 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1387|en|1387|qid=Q6359|lt=1387|1=1387}} {{ill|October 5|en|October 5|qid=Q2930|lt=October 5|1=October 5}}) – The {{ill|Kitachō|ja|北朝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitachō|1=Northern Dynasties|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1207446}} changed the era name from {{ill|Shitoku (Japan)|ja|至徳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shitoku (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=至德|qid=Q1207030}} to {{ill|Kakēi|ja|嘉慶|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kakēi|1=Kakēi (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11419403}}. * {{ill|Daiei (era)|en|Daiei (era)|qid=Q1193564|lt=Daiei|1=Daiei (era)}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1521|en|1521|qid=Q6288|lt=1521|1=1521}} {{ill|September 23|en|September 23|qid=Q2888|lt=September 23|1=September 23}}) – Due to warfare and extraordinary natural disasters, the era name was changed from {{ill|Eishō (Muromachi period)|en|Eishō (Muromachi period)|qid=Q1193577|lt=Eishō|1=Eishō (Muromachi period)}} to {{ill|Daiei (era)|en|Daiei (era)|qid=Q1193564|lt=Daiei|1=Daiei (era)}}. * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|qid=Q1146125|lt=Kaei|1=Kaei}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1854|en|1854|qid=Q7670|lt=1854|1=1854}} {{ill|October 14|en|October 14|qid=Q2922|lt=October 14|1=October 14}}) – The {{ill|Anglo-Japanese Friendship Treaty|en|Anglo-Japanese Friendship Treaty|qid=Q1342523|lt=Treaty of Anglo-Japanese Friendship|1=Anglo-Japanese Friendship Treaty}} was signed. * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1855|en|1855|qid=Q7673|lt=1855|1=1855}} {{ill|October 3|en|October 3|qid=Q2931|lt=October 3|1=October 3}}) – The Satsuma Domain successfully conducted the trial run of Japan’s first domestically built steamship, the {{ill|Unkōmaru|ja|雲行丸|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unkōmaru|1=Unkōmaru|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11660081}}, off the coast in front of their residence in Edo. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|qid=Q7717|lt=1868|1=1868}} {{ill|October 8|en|October 8|qid=Q2924|lt=October 8|1=October 8}}) – During the 【Boshin War】, 20 members of the 【Byakko-tai】 from the Aizu Domain committed ritual suicide at Mount Ii. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1871|en|1871|qid=Q7746|lt=1871|1=1871}} {{ill|October 20|en|October 20|qid=Q2959|lt=October 20|1=October 20}}) – Marriage between the kazoku (peerage) and commoners was permitted. == Births == * {{ill|Kansei|en|Kansei|qid=Q1195131|lt=Kansei|1=Kansei}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1793|en|1793|qid=Q7807|lt=1793|1=1793}} {{ill|September 27|en|September 27|qid=Q2884|lt=September 27|1=September 27}}) – {{ill|Tōyama Kagemoto|en|Tōyama Kagemoto|qid=Q7862747|lt=Toyama Kagemoto|1=Tōyama Kagemoto}} (also known as Toyama Kinsirō), who served as an Edo town magistrate (died {{ill|1855|en|1855|qid=Q7673|lt=1855|1=1855}}). * {{ill|Kansei|en|Kansei|qid=Q1195131|lt=Kansei|1=Kansei}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} 1793, {{ill|September 27|en|September 27|qid=Q2884|lt=September 27|1=September 27}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Naritomo|en|Tokugawa Naritomo|qid=Q3336100|lt=Tokugawa Zaitora|1=Tokugawa Naritomo}}, the 10th head of the {{ill|Owari Domain|en|Owari Domain|qid=Q1062072|lt=Owari Domain|1=Owari Domain}} (died {{ill|1850|en|1850|qid=Q7653|lt=1850|1=1850}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Jianxing|en|Jianxing|qid=Q1208590|lt=Kenkō (Shu)|1=Jianxing}} 12nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|234|en|234|qid=Q33646|lt=234|1=234}} {{ill|October 3|en|October 3|qid=Q2931|lt=October 3|1=October 3}}) – {{ill|Zhuge Liang|en|Zhuge Liang|qid=Q198211|lt=Zhuge Liang|1=Zhuge Liang}}, the chancellor of Shu (born {{ill|181|en|181|qid=Q31368|lt=181|1=181}}). * {{ill|Shōō (Kamakura period)|en|Shōō (Kamakura period)|qid=Q1327371|lt=Shōō (Kamakura period)|1=Shōō (Kamakura period)}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1289|en|1289|qid=Q5551|lt=1289|1=1289}} {{ill|September 9|en|September 9|qid=Q2856|lt=September 9|1=September 9}}) – {{ill|Ippen|en|Ippen|qid=Q1056232|lt=Ippen|1=Ippen}}, the founder of the Jishū branch of {{ill|Ji-shu|en|Ji-shu|qid=Q696966|lt=Ji Zen|1=Ji-shu}} (born {{ill|1239|en|1239|qid=Q5434|lt=1239|1=1239}}). * {{ill|Yongzheng|ja|雍正|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yongzheng|1=Yongzheng Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q708977}} 13rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1735|en|1735|qid=Q6984|lt=1735|1=1735}} {{ill|October 9|en|October 9|qid=Q2923|lt=October 9|1=October 9}}) – {{ill|Yongzheng Emperor|en|Yongzheng Emperor|qid=Q317839|lt=Yongzheng Emperor|1=Yongzheng Emperor}}, the 5th Emperor of the {{ill|Qing dynasty|ja|清朝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Qing dynasty|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 清|1=Qing dynasty|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q8733}} (born {{ill|1678|en|1678|qid=Q7634|lt=1678|1=1678}}). == Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|8|22|8|24|7|23|9|8|0823|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[cdo:8 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[de:August 23 (Lunisolar)]]
[[ko:음력 8월 23일]] [[ja:8月23日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:八月廿三]]
[[ar:August 23 (Lunisolar)]]
